---
title: "Learning"
title-meta: "Learning Log | Pierpaolo Vendittelli"
description: "Learning log of Pierpaolo Vendittelli covering machine learning fundamentals, LeetCode practice, and system design progress."
toc: false
---

<div id="learning-root"></div>

```{=html}
<script type="module" src="assets/js/pages/learning.js"></script>
```
